title: bikkia artensis
intro: Bikkia artensis, also known as the 'Makamaka', is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands, specifically in Hawaii and Samoa. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bikkia artensis include relief from fever, headache, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Bikkia artensis may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat a range of health issues.
